message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 5 driver vote — Luca continuing?">
Mini-retro is complete. The team is now deciding on the Step 5 driver. Luca has offered to continue given his context on inbox and next actions code. Does anyone object or want to propose an alternative? Please send your preference to luca-palmieri so the team can reach consensus and get started.

Also Luca — please update docs/gtd-product-discovery.md to mark Step 4 complete before starting Step 5.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already sent my +1 for Luca as Driver in my previous message, along with the type sketch. No need to repeat myself -- I'll just confirm briefly.

input.content:

Please also review the type sketch I proposed for `clarify_as_next_action` in that same message -- I'd like the team to align on the domain model before you start TDD.
